channel.title: SY0-701 on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in SY0-701 on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): General Security Concepts
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Cryptography" , "PKI" , "Zero Trust" , "Access Control" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Security Controls" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master general security concepts for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn security controls, the CIA triad, change management, cryptography, PKI, and Zero Trust.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Architecture
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Architecture" , "Cloud Security" , "Data Protection" , "Resilience" , "Network Security" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security architecture for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn architecture models, infrastructure security, data protection, and resilience and recovery.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Operations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Operations" , "Incident Response" , "Identity Management" , "Vulnerability Management" , "Automation" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "SIEM" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security operations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn secure baselines, asset management, vulnerability management, monitoring, IAM, automation, and incident response.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Security Program Management and Oversight
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Security Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Audits" , "Security Awareness" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Third-Party Risk" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master security program management and oversight for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn governance, risk management, third-party risk, compliance, audits, and security awareness.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701): Threats, Vulnerabilities, and Mitigations
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Threat Analysis" , "Vulnerabilities" , "Malware" , "Social Engineering" , "Attack Vectors" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Mitigation" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master threats, vulnerabilities, and mitigations for the CompTIA Security+ SY0-701 exam. Learn threat actors, attack vectors, vulnerability types, malicious indicators, and mitigation techniques.

item.title: CompTIA Security+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the SY0-701 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA Security+ Course" , "Cybersecurity Certification" , "Security Fundamentals" , "Threat Analysis" , "Security Architecture" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Information Security" , "Risk Management" , "Incident Response" , "Security Operations"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA Security+ (SY0-701) study course covering all five exam domains: general security concepts, threats and vulnerabilities, security architecture, security operations, and security program management.
